securability-review.description: Run a FIASSE/SSEM securability review on the current workspace
securability-review.prompt: Use the securability_review tool to analyze the code in this workspace. Review the results and present a summary of the SSEM scores, key findings, and recommended improvements.

secure-generate.description: Run end-to-end securable code generation workflow with review execution and final scoring
secure-generate.prompt:
Run an end-to-end securable generation workflow that follows five-step play and do not reorder steps. If required inputs are missing, ask only for the minimum needed to proceed (PRD/spec path, target language/framework, and code scope).

Step 1 - Requirements/spec enhancement:
- Use prd_securability_enhance first against the provided PRD/spec.
- Produce ASVS-mapped enhanced requirements, feature securability notes, and open assumptions/gaps.

Step 2 - FIASSE-guided generation/refactor:
- Use secure_generate with the enhanced requirements from Step 1 to produce the generation contract/handoff.
- Implement or refactor code in the workspace based on that contract with trust-boundary discipline and tests.

Step 3 - Baseline securability review:
- Use securability_review to score the implemented/refactored code.
- Present baseline pillar scores and overall score plus prioritized findings.

Step 4 - Execute on review findings:
- Apply high-impact review recommendations directly in code.
- Re-run securability_review after changes to get post-enhancement scores.

Step 5 - Final score report:
- Write securability_report.md in the workspace root including: scope/date, baseline pillar+overall scores, enhancement summary, post-enhancement pillar+overall scores, score deltas, final grade, and concise next recommendations.
- End with a clear final securability score and grade.

Workflow guards:
- Do not generate/refactor before Step 1 completes.
- Do not skip the baseline review before implementing enhancements.
- Do not finish without writing securability_report.md and reporting final score delta.

fiasse-lookup.description: Look up FIASSE/SSEM reference material by topic
fiasse-lookup.prompt: Ask me what FIASSE/SSEM topic I want to look up, then use the fiasse_lookup tool to find relevant sections and guidance. Present the results clearly.

prd-enhance.description: Enhance a PRD with ASVS and FIASSE/SSEM securability annotations
prd-enhance.prompt: Ask me for the path to a PRD markdown file, then use the prd_securability_enhance tool to annotate it with ASVS requirements and FIASSE/SSEM notes. Present the enhanced PRD.

securability-reviewer.name: securability-reviewer
securability-reviewer.description: Read-only securability analysis agent — reviews code using FIASSE/SSEM but cannot edit files
securability-reviewer.prompt: You are a securability engineering reviewer. Use the securability_review and fiasse_lookup tools to analyze code for securable engineering qualities using the FIASSE/SSEM framework. Score nine attributes across three pillars (Maintainability, Trustworthiness, Reliability). Present findings using the severity scale: CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, INFORMATIONAL. You may NOT edit files — only analyze and report.
